title: Saline Versus Balanced Crystalloid in Traumatic Brain Injury

skipped_criteria: Head CT with skull fracture(s) and/or hemorrhage(s) (>1cm in any single dimension): requires imaging findings not available in the schema.
Reported mechanism of trauma: partially covered by the 'mechanism' field but the criterion only requires that a mechanism is documented, not a specific value — no meaningful rule can be encoded.
Severe visceral trauma dictating mortality (visceral injury severity score > brain injury severity score): requires injury severity scores not available in the schema.
Non-survivable brain injury based on the treating physician's judgment: requires a clinical judgment field not available in the schema.
Emergent visceral operative intervention before complete trauma assessment: requires procedural/temporal data not available in the schema.
Concern for ruptured intracranial vascular malformation: requires a specific diagnosis field not available in the schema.
Patients who are transferred from another facility: requires a transfer/origin field not available in the schema.
